response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C++ (though primarily on Linux/Unix rather than the Windows platform specified in the job description), but lacks the required domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking. While their technical skills are strong, their background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, embedded systems, and language/tooling development (e.g., Dlang, Node.js), with no clear evidence of financial-services domain exposure or SQL Server/Oracle experience.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (10+ years, though not exclusively on Windows)
Demonstrated proficiency in high-performance computing and low-latency applications
Proven ability to work with databases (MongoDB, MySQL) and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: No evidence of Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain expertise
Primary experience is in web/mobile development, not Windows-based financial systems
Lack of SQL Server or Oracle experience (required by the role)
